data.name: Resonance Of Princess Reign
data.detailed_description:
In a faraway kingdom, Princess Mati is kidnapped by the Dark Lord Valtur, an evil being with dark powers. However, thanks to a mysterious gadget from the future, the Dark Lord Valtur manages to take compromising photos of the Princess and threatens to spread them throughout the kingdom unless a ransom of one million dollars is paid.

Desperate, the king of the kingdom decides to entrust a brave warrior, named Kara, with the task of saving Princess Mati and destroying the compromising photos. Kara a young fearless warrior , sets out on the mission, determined to bring peace to the kingdom and save the princess.

Enter the kingdom of Princess Mati
−Top Down gameplay
−Many areas to explore
−Pictures 18+ to find in the various areas of the map
−Side quests
−Power ups
−Bosses on every level
−Retro Chiptune soundtrack

data.short_description: In a faraway kingdom, Princess Mati is kidnapped by the Dark Lord Valtur, an evil being with dark powers. However, thanks to a mysterious gadget from the future, the Dark Lord Valtur manages to take compromising photos of the Princess and threatens to spread them throughout the kingdom

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: Intel i3
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel Graphics 4000 HD
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X 10.6 or later
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: x86/x86_64
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Intel Graphics 4000 HD
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
